name: modulo_addition_2layer_mlp
description: Two-layer MLP trained on modular arithmetic. Same task as the 1-layer transformer but without attention, positional embedding, or residual stream. Input is one-hot (a, b) concatenated (size 2p).

data_seed.description: Random seed for train/test split of the (a, b) input grid

analysis_dataset.description: Full (a, b) input grid encoded as one-hot concatenation (size 2p)
